title: Chopper Runs Through the Snow
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on chopper runs through the snow, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper Runs Through the Snow. Chopper tries to save Hiriluk with the mushroom he believes is medicine, turning love and ignorance into tragedy. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Recovered? That ain't no illness you can "recover" from.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It's incurable with the medicine available today. Didn't you hear it yourself too while eavesdropping at my place?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Doc said he got all better after drinking the soup made from this!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: B-But!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Is that...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The Amilukake mush- Room!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: It's the ingredient for a panacea so he's all better now!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: He can live and teach me how to become a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: HILLULUK...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Can't this thing go up any faster!?

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: I don't have any time left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: hurry it up!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I'm fighting for every last minute and second here! So move it!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You stupid rein- deer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Propetence depends

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What a..!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That mush- room you fed him...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Was a poison mush- room!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Eating one will kill you within an hour.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That can't be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I even looked it up in a book.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's a mushroom that can heal everything!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That's right! This skull here laughs at the impossible! It's a symbol of unwavering conviction!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: With this flag, I shall fight on like a true pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: See look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The picture for this mush- room has a skull next to it!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Doc even said he's all better now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So there's no way he could die, you liar!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: He's a good- natural kid.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That was just him appreciating your efforts...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: But you have to understand... skull and cross- bones are a symbol for poison!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You're lying!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm not lying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Listen to me, there's no magical panacea that can cure everything in this world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's precisely why we need doctors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kindness alone can't save people! You need knowledge and medical skill to go along with it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Without it, you can't save a single person!

summary: This part highlights chopper runs through the snow and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
